Peran ini mencakup pengembangan aplikasi, integrasi sistem, peningkatan performa dan reliability, penerapan best practice engineering, serta memastikan standar keamanan dan kualitas aplikasi sesuai kebutuhan industri perbankan.

Mengembangkan, menguji, dan memelihara aplikasi digital (web, mobile, dan backend services) khususnya di lingkungan digital banking.

Berkolaborasi dengan tim lintas fungsi menggunakan metodologi Agile/Scrum.

Mengembangkan aplikasi yang scalable, secure, dan high-performance.

Mengelola integrasi API, messaging system, dan data processing.

Backend: Java (Spring Boot), Python, Node.js, .NET

title: Software Engineer (Intern)
description_raw:
Deskripsi pekerjaan Software Engineer (Intern) Glints Taploker

At Glints, we are building the #1 tech-enabled recruitment and career discovery platform in Southeast Asia that helps people and organizations realize their human potential.

Join Glints as a Software Engineer Intern and be part of our mission to help people and organizations realize their human potential. You’ll work with experienced engineers on real-world products that power job matching, hiring, and talent development in Southeast Asia.

Whether your focus is frontend, backend, or full-stack, you’ll build scalable solutions, learn agile development, and gain mentorship from Glints’ high-performance engineering team.

A Pathway to Your Full-Time Career

Please note: This program is designed as a direct launchpad for a full-time career at Glints. Our primary goal is to mentor and develop promising talent into long-term team members.

Full-Time Conversion: While not guaranteed, this internship has a strong potential for a full-time (FT) offer. Conversion is based on your performance during the program and business needs at the time of completion.
Eligibility: Because of this, the ideal candidate is a final-year university student or a recent graduate who is able to transition into a full-time role.
Commitment & Location: This is a full-time role. While the on-site requirement for the internship is negotiable, we expect you to work from our office upon conversion to a full-time position.

What You'll Be Doing

In this role, you will:

- Collaborate with an agile development team to support the delivery of impactful web features and improvements.

- Assist in building and testing web application features, primarily using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, TypeScript, and React or similar frameworks.

- Support frontend development tasks such as fixing bugs, improving UI, or implementing small features under close guidance.

- Participate in code reviews, and team discussions where you will learn industry best practi

title: Data Analyst Intern
description_raw:
Deskripsi pekerjaan Data Analyst Intern Markethac

Sebagai Data Analyst, kamu akan berperan penting dalam mengolah, menganalisis, dan menerjemahkan data menjadi insight yang dapat mendukung pengambilan keputusan bisnis serta pengembangan solusi AI untuk klien.

🛠 Responsibilities

- Mengumpulkan, membersihkan, dan mengolah data dari berbagai sumber

- Melakukan analisis data untuk menemukan pola, tren, dan insight bisnis

- Menyusun laporan, dashboard, dan visualisasi data yang informatif

- Berkolaborasi dengan tim Data Scientist, AI Engineer, dan Business Team

- Mendukung pengembangan model AI/ML melalui data preparation & exploratory data analysis

- Menyampaikan hasil analisis secara jelas kepada stakeholder teknis & non-teknis

✅ Requirements

- Pendidikan minimal S1 (Statistika, Matematika, Ilmu Komputer, Data Science, atau bidang terkait)

- Menguasai SQL dan Python (Pandas, NumPy, Matplotlib/Seaborn)

- Memahami konsep data analysis, statistik dasar, dan data visualization

- Pengalaman menggunakan BI tools (Tableau, Power BI, Looker, dsb.) menjadi nilai tambah

- Familiar dengan database (BigQuery / PostgreSQL / MySQL)

- Memiliki kemampuan problem-solving dan analytical thinking yang baik

- Komunikatif dan mampu bekerja dalam tim lintas fungsi

⭐ Nice to Have

- Pengalaman di proyek AI / machine learning

- Pemahaman dasar tentang cloud platform (GCP / AWS)

- Pengalaman di consulting atau project-based environment

🎁 What You’ll Get

- Kesempatan terlibat langsung dalam proyek AI & data skala industri

- Lingkungan kerja kolaboratif & berbasis learning

- Pengembangan skill data & AI secara berkelanjutan

- Career growth yang jelas di industri AI & teknologi

- Paid dan makan 2x sehari
skills: aws, gcp, numpy, pandas, powerbi, python, sql, tableau

Deskripsi pekerjaan intern data analyst PT Karsa Omni Teknologi Adicipta

we're offering an internship for aspiring Data Analysts who want to move beyond classroom theory and work with real data that drives real decisions.

You'll support our analytics team by cleaning data, building dashboards, running queries, and helping uncover patterns that matter. This isn't about fetching coffee or shadowing silently — it's about doing real work, making mistakes, learning fast, and contributing to projects that impact product, marketing, and strategy.

If you've played with SQL, explored a dataset in Python, or built a simple visualization just for fun — you're already on the right path.

✅ Assist in data cleaning, validation, and preparation for analysis

✅ Support ad-hoc analysis: user behavior, campaign performance, feature adoption

✅ Document findings, create simple reports, and present insights to the team

✅ Learn best practices in data governance, version control, and analytics workflows

✅ Collaborate with analysts, engineers, and product teams to understand business context

Who You Are:

✅ Currently pursuing or recently completed a degree in Data Science, Statistics, Computer Science, Economics, or related field

✅ Basic understanding of SQL and willingness to improve quickly

✅ Familiarity with Excel/Google Sheets and curiosity about Python or R (even beginner level is fine)

✅ Exposure to data visualization tools (Looker Studio, Tableau, Power BI) is a plus

✅ Detail-oriented, organized, and comfortable asking questions

✅ Fluent in Bahasa Indonesia; basic English is a plus

✅ Eager to learn, receive feedback, and grow through real projects
